# body1TextProvider

**Instance Property**

The top line of body text.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var body1TextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

If you don’t specify a value for the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateModularLargeStandardBody/body2TextProvider] property, the text in this property wraps to the second line.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **headerImageProvider**: An optional image to display in the header.
- **headerTextProvider**: The text to display in the header line.
- **body2TextProvider**: An optional second line of body text.
